title: Goat Milk Soap
content:
# Handcrafted Goat’s Milk Soaps – Made on Our Homestead
Each bar of our soap is lovingly handcrafted in small batches with fresh goat’s milk sourced directly from our homestead. The natural goodness of goat’s milk is the heart of every bar, creating a creamy, moisturizing base that enriches the soap’s texture. We offer two distinctive collections, each designed to inspire and delight:

![Joyful Collection](./assets/images/uploads/1772323203357-0+.webp)
## 🎨 Joyful Collection
A celebration of color, creativity, and joy! The Joyful Collection brings bold hues and uplifting scents to your daily routine. Infused with vibrant, ethically sourced micas and phthalate-free fragrance oils, each bar is a burst of happiness, designed to brighten your mood and inspire your senses, all while benefiting from the fresh goat’s milk in every batch.

![Pure Collection](./assets/images/uploads/1772323274916-0+.webp)
## 🌿 Pure Collection
Rooted in simplicity and nature’s finest ingredients, The Pure Collection celebrates the purity of goat’s milk, essential oils, and natural clays. Each bar offers a gentle, minimalist experience, perfect for those who appreciate the clean, natural beauty of simple ingredients.

Whether you choose the serene purity of The Pure Collection or the playful energy of The Joyful Collection, every soap is made with fresh goat’s milk, handcrafting care, and intentional, quality ingredients.

🐐 Fresh goat’s milk from our homestead in every batch
🖐️ Handmade in small batches
🌸 Essential oils & natural clays (Pure Collection)
✨ Phthalate-free fragrance oils & vibrant micas (Joyful Collection)
💚 Crafted with care and intention
